title: February 25
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|February|hide30=yes|hide31=yes}}

'''February 25''' is the 56th day of the year. There are 309 days remaining (310 in leap years).</noinclude>

*[[1930s#1938|1938]] – [[Malcolm Tierney]] is born.
*[[1940s#1944|1944]] – [[Roger Christian]] is born.
*[[1940s#1946|1946]] – [[Rick Geary]] is born.
*[[1994]] – [[Alex Knoll]] is born.
*[[1998]] – [[Star Wars Insider 36|''Star Wars Insider'' 36]] published.
*[[1999]] – [[Star Wars Insider 42|''Star Wars Insider'' 42]] published.
*[[2002]] – [[Claire Davenport]] dies.
*[[2003]] – ''[[Jedi Quest: The Master of Disguise]]'' abridged cassette released.
*[[2004]] – [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume 3: Last Stand on Jabiim|''Clone Wars Volume 3: Last Stand on Jabiim'']] published.
*[[2005]] – ''[[Plug it in and Play: Star Wars Episode III: Revenge of the Sith]]'' released.
*[[2009]] – ''[[Star Wars: Legacy Volume 5: The Hidden Temple]]'' published.
*2009 – [[Legacy (2006) 33|''Legacy'' (2006) 33]] published.
*[[2015]] – [[Darth Vader (2015) 2|''Darth Vader'' (2015) 2]] published.
*2015 – [[Star Wars Rebels Magazine 2|''Star Wars Rebels'' Magazine 2]] published in the United Kingdom.
*[[2017]] – "[[Through Imperial Eyes]]" airs on [[Disney XD]].
*[[2020]] – ''[[Star Wars Resistance]]'' [[Star Wars Resistance Season Two|Season Two]] added to [[Disney+]].
*[[2025]] – ''[[Reign of the Empire: The Mask of Fear]]'' published.
*2025 – [[Reign of the Empire: The Mask of Fear (audiobook)|''Reign of the Empire: The Mask of Fear'' audiobook]] released.
*2025 – ''[[Star Wars: Galaxy's Edge: A Batuu Adventure!]]'' published. 
*2025 – [[Star Wars Insider 230|''Star Wars Insider'' 230]] published.
